Stay tuned to http://t.co/UKm9plIx for a transcript of remarks by #SecClinton on the #Maghreb in transition.
#SecClinton: The U.S. will not retreat. We will keep leading and we will stay engaged in the #Maghreb and everywhere in the world.
#SecClinton: Chris Stevens and Robert Ford represent diplomacy -- and America -- at its and our best. #Maghreb http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: But it is our solemn responsibility to constantly improve, to reduce the risks our people face. #Maghreb http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: We will never prevent every act of violence or terrorism, or achieve perfect security. #Maghreb http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: I remain convinced the people of the Arab world do't want to trade the tyranny of a dictator for the tyranny of a mob. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: Dignity comes from taking responsibility for one’s self and one’s community. #Maghreb http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: Dignity does not come from avenging perceived insults, especially with violence that can't be justified. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: We remain committed to increasing pressure on the regime. #Syria http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: In #Syria, the Assad regime continues to wage brutal war against its own people, even as territory slips from its grasp.
#SecClinton: We stand with the people of #Egypt in their quest for universal freedoms and protections. http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: The transitions under way in the #Maghreb are linked with developments across the wider Middle East. http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: I'm proud of our new $10 million scholarship fund to help Tunisian students study at U.S. universities. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: We are expanding our work with #CivilSociety organizations in terrorist hotspots -- particular villages and schools. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: It takes political will to make hard choices and demand the accountability that's necessary for strong institutions. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: The U.S. is using all the tools in our arsenal to help our #Maghreb partners fight terrorism and meet their security challenges
#SecClinton: Words are cheap. It must be followed by actual investments so we have mobilized $1 billion in targeted assistance. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: It's too soon to say how these transitions will play out. What’s not in doubt is that America has a big stake in the outcome.
#SecClinton: Last year when citizens of #Morocco called for change, King Mohammed VI answered with major constitutional reforms. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: #CivilSociety is wise to remain vigilant and to exercise their hard-earned rights to safeguard their new democracy. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: The terrorists who attacked our mission in #Benghazi did not represent the millions of Libyan people who want peace. #Maghreb
#SecClinton: We always have to be clear-eyed about the threat of extremism. #Maghreb http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: Upholding the rights of all citizens regardless of faith, ethnicity or gender should be expected. #Maghreb http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: We will not pull back our support for emerging democracies when the going gets tough. #Maghreb http://t.co/E3JVFZi3
#SecClinton: We will not return to the false choice between freedom and stability. #Maghreb http://t.co/E3JVFZi3
#SecClinton: We tailor our tactics for promoting democratic change to the conditions on the ground in each country. http://t.co/E3JVFZi3
#SecClinton on #Benghazi: No one wants to find out exactly what happened more than I do. http://t.co/E3JVFZi3
#SecClinton: I strongly condemn the killing of a longtime embassy employee in Sana'a. #Yemen http://t.co/E3JVFZi3
